hero.headline: Privacy Policy
hero.subheadline: Your data, protected with the same care we apply to API integrations

content.text: At Squared² Pty Ltd (ABN 12 345 678 901), we handle sensitive business data daily through our Square API integrations. We understand the trust you place in us and take privacy seriously—not just because Australian law requires it, but because your business depends on it.
key_points: We comply with the Australian Privacy Act 1988 and Privacy Principles
We never sell, share, or monetize your data
We use bank-level security for all data handling
You maintain full control over your information

subsections.subtitle: Business Information
items: Company name, ABN, and contact details

subsections.subtitle: Technical Information
items: Square API credentials (stored securely, never in plain text)

subsections.subtitle: Website Analytics
subsections.note: We use privacy-focused analytics that don't track individuals

primary_uses.description: To build, test, and maintain your Square API integrations
To update you about your project, respond to inquiries, and provide support
To enhance our services and develop better integration solutions
To meet legal obligations and maintain proper business records

we_never: Sell your information to third parties
Use your data for unrelated marketing
Access your Square data beyond integration needs

measures.title: Encryption
measures.description: All data transmitted and stored uses industry-standard encryption (TLS 1.3+, AES-256)

measures.title: Access Control
measures.description: Strict role-based access limited to authorized team members only

measures.title: Secure Infrastructure
measures.description: Australian-hosted servers with 24/7 monitoring and regular security audits

measures.title: API Credentials
measures.description: OAuth tokens stored in encrypted vaults, never in code or plain text

measures.title: Regular Audits
measures.description: Quarterly security reviews and annual third-party penetration testing

content.incident_response: In the unlikely event of a data breach, we'll notify affected parties within 72 hours as required by Australian law.

content.intro: We use select third-party services to deliver our solutions. Each is chosen for their privacy practices and security standards:

services.data_shared: Payment information (we never see card details)

content.note: We only share the minimum information necessary for each service to function.

content.intro: Under Australian Privacy Law, you have the right to:

rights.description: Request a copy of all information we hold about you
Update or correct any inaccurate information
Request removal of your data (subject to legal requirements)
Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
Opt out of marketing communications at any time

content.how_to_exercise: To exercise any of these rights, email privacy@squared.com.au or call 1300 SQUARED. We'll respond within 30 days.

content.policy: We keep your information only as long as necessary to provide services and meet legal obligations:
content.deletion: When retention periods expire, data is securely destroyed using industry-standard methods.

content.intro: We use minimal cookies to improve your experience:
content.control: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may impact site functionality.
content.no_tracking: We don't use tracking pixels, fingerprinting, or invasive analytics.

content.text: Our services are designed for businesses. We don't knowingly collect information from anyone under 18. If we learn we've collected such information, we'll delete it immediately.

content.policy: We store and process all data in Australia whenever possible. When international transfer is necessary (e.g., Square's US-based API), we ensure:
safeguards: Appropriate contractual clauses are in place
Recipient countries have adequate privacy laws

content.text: We may update this policy to reflect changes in law or our practices. We'll notify you of material changes via email and post updates here with the revision date.
content.commitment: Changes will never reduce your privacy rights without your explicit consent.

content.intro: Questions about privacy? We're here to help:

contact_details.response_time: We aim to respond within 2 business days

complaints.text: If you're not satisfied with our privacy handling, you can lodge a complaint with:
complaints.authority: Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC)

footer.certification: This privacy policy complies with the Australian Privacy Act 1988 and the Australian Privacy Principles (APPs).
footer.transparency: We believe in earning trust through transparency. If you have any questions about how we handle data, just ask.
